name: Beef Stew: Eisenhower's Recipe
recipeIngredient: Assorted spices (thyme, bay leaves, garlic, etc.) in cheesecloth bag
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the stew meat until tender.
2. Add vegetables and spices.
3. Cook until vegetables are done.
4. Strain off one cup of stock from the stew.
5. Thicken slightly with a beef roux mixture.
6. Pour back into the stew and let simmer until ready to serve (about 1/2 hour).
7. Remove the cheesecloth bag of spices.
Makes 6 servings.
